case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS MILNER, ANTHONY G.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILNER, ANTHONY G. $1,229.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,222.49 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,465.99, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 455006. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON 8/22/86. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT MILNER, ANTHONY G. HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $99.99 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MILNER, ANTHONY G.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF HEARING & NOTICE OF OPPOSITION FROM SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPT.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $30 PER PAY PERIOD ON ACCOUNT OF THE DEBT.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 455006 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MILNER, ANTHONY G.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MILNER, ANTHONY G.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MAR-24-1997, DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT MILNER, ANTHONY G.
